results.next_action: Use Hitachi, Ltd. investor-relations materials and Annual Securities Report / semi-annual securities filings via EDINET as the first filing route for bounded follow-up.

evidence.note: Official Hitachi Energy source describing Hitachi Energy as a wholly owned subsidiary of Hitachi, Ltd.
Official Hitachi IR library page for Annual Securities Report and related filings filed via EDINET.
Official Hitachi IR FAQ stating Annual Securities Report materials are available via EDINET and that Hitachi shares are listed in Japan.
